title: Jung-Kuei Yang
text: Home * People * Jung-Kuei Yang Jung-Kuei Yang , a Taiwanese computer scientist at Lan Yang Institute of Technology , Toucheng, Yilan . He works and published on bitboard techniques and Monte-Carlo tree search applied to Connect6 . He is primary author of the Connect6 program Kavalan , which won the 21st Computer Olympiad 2018 .
